_help: One judgment, one file: records/judgments/JDG-NNNN.json (schema/record.judgment.schema.json). kind ∈ sign-off | deviation | risk-acceptance | break-glass. Every judgment is dated, owned (by), scoped (subject), reasoned, and EXPIRES (review_by). expected_state snapshots the world you assumed; tripwire is the machine-evaluable condition that voids the judgment when that world changes; a break-glass also names the gate it relieves and must land on main via its own prior PR (FS5). Author + evaluate with `baseline jdg new|check` (M4b); reconcile sweeps tripwires on cron (M6).
subject: SEC-13
reason: Dependency-vuln scan deferred until the first external consumer; the zero-dependency runner keeps the attack surface minimal meanwhile.
